---
title: "Day 22 - New Tool"
format: html
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| message: false
#| warning: false

library(tidyverse)
library(magick)
library(zoo)
library(scales)
```

## Data Preparation

```{r}
#| label: data-preparation

bin_midpoints <- tribble(
  ~BIN, ~DLY_MIN,
  "(-INF,-60]", -70,
  "(-60,-55]", -57.5,
  "(-55,-50]", -52.5,
  "(-50,-45]", -47.5,
  "(-45,-40]", -42.5,
  "(-40,-35]", -37.5,
  "(-35,-30]", -32.5,
  "(-30,-25]", -27.5,
  "(-25,-20]", -22.5,
  "(-20,-15]", -17.5,
  "(-15,-10]", -12.5,
  "(-10,-5]", -7.5,
  "(-5,0]", -2.5,
  "(0,5)", 2.5,
  "[5,10)", 7.5,
  "[10,15)", 12.5,
  "[15,20)", 17.5,
  "[20,25)", 22.5,
  "[25,30)", 27.5,
  "[30,35)", 32.5,
  "[35,40)", 37.5,
  "[40,45)", 42.5,
  "[45,50)", 47.5,
  "[50,55)", 52.5,
  "[55,60)", 57.5,
  "[60,INF)", 70
)

read_punctuality <- function(path, year, region) {
  punc <- readr::read_csv(path, show_col_types = FALSE)

  if ("APT" %in% names(punc)) {
    punc <- punc |>
      rename(ICAO = APT)
  }

  punc |>
    mutate(
      DATE = lubridate::ymd(as.character(DATE)),
      YEAR = year,
      REGION = region
    ) |>
    filter(
      DATE >= lubridate::ymd(paste0(year, "-01-01")),
      DATE <= lubridate::ymd(paste0(year, "-12-31"))
    )
}

bra_apts <- c("SBBR", "SBGR", "SBSP", "SBKP", "SBRJ", "SBGL", "SBCF", "SBSV", "SBPA", "SBCT", "SBRF", "SBEG")
eur_apts <- c("EGLL", "EGKK", "EHAM", "EDDF", "EDDM", "LSZH", "LFPG", "LEMD", "LEBL", "LPPT", "LTFM", "LGAV")
study_apts <- c(bra_apts, eur_apts)

punctuality_raw <- bind_rows(
  read_punctuality("./data/BRA-punc-2023.csv", 2023, "Brazil"),
  read_punctuality("./data/BRA-punc-2024.csv", 2024, "Brazil"),
  read_punctuality("./data/BRA-punc-2025.csv", 2025, "Brazil"),
  read_punctuality("./data/EUR-punc-2023.csv", 2023, "Europe"),
  read_punctuality("./data/EUR-punc-2024.csv", 2024, "Europe"),
  read_punctuality("./data/PBWG-EUR-punc-2025.csv", 2025, "Europe")
) |>
  filter(ICAO %in% study_apts)

delay_daily <- punctuality_raw |>
  pivot_longer(
    cols = matches("^\\(|^\\["),
    names_to = "BIN",
    values_to = "N_FLTS"
  ) |>
  left_join(bin_midpoints, by = "BIN") |>
  mutate(
    POS_DLY_MIN = pmax(DLY_MIN, 0) * N_FLTS,
    DLY_15_FLTS = if_else(DLY_MIN >= 15, N_FLTS, 0)
  ) |>
  group_by(REGION, ICAO, DATE, YEAR, PHASE) |>
  summarise(
    N_PHASE = sum(N_FLTS, na.rm = TRUE),
    POS_DLY_PER_FLT = sum(POS_DLY_MIN, na.rm = TRUE) / N_PHASE,
    SHARE_DLY_15 = sum(DLY_15_FLTS, na.rm = TRUE) / N_PHASE,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  group_by(REGION, ICAO, DATE, YEAR) |>
  summarise(
    N_FLTS = sum(N_PHASE, na.rm = TRUE),
    AVG_DLY = sum(POS_DLY_PER_FLT * N_PHASE, na.rm = TRUE) / N_FLTS,
    SHARE_DLY_15 = sum(SHARE_DLY_15 * N_PHASE, na.rm = TRUE) / N_FLTS,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  arrange(REGION, ICAO, DATE) |>
  group_by(REGION, ICAO) |>
  mutate(
    AVG_DLY_7D = rollmean(AVG_DLY, k = 7, fill = NA, align = "right"),
    SHARE_DLY_15_7D = rollmean(SHARE_DLY_15, k = 7, fill = NA, align = "right")
  ) |>
  ungroup() |>
  filter(!is.na(AVG_DLY_7D))

airport_order <- delay_daily |>
  summarise(MED_DLY = median(AVG_DLY_7D, na.rm = TRUE), .by = c(REGION, ICAO)) |>
  arrange(REGION, MED_DLY) |>
  pull(ICAO)

delay_daily <- delay_daily |>
  mutate(
    REGION = factor(REGION, levels = c("Brazil", "Europe")),
    ICAO = factor(ICAO, levels = unique(airport_order))
  )

delay_anim_weekly <- delay_daily |>
  mutate(WEEK = lubridate::floor_date(DATE, unit = "week", week_start = 1)) |>
  summarise(
    DATE = max(DATE, na.rm = TRUE),
    DOY = round(mean(lubridate::yday(DATE), na.rm = TRUE)),
    AVG_DLY_7D = weighted.mean(AVG_DLY_7D, N_FLTS, na.rm = TRUE),
    SHARE_DLY_15_7D = weighted.mean(SHARE_DLY_15_7D, N_FLTS, na.rm = TRUE),
    N_FLTS = sum(N_FLTS, na.rm = TRUE),
    .by = c(REGION, ICAO, YEAR, WEEK)
  )

network_daily <- delay_anim_weekly |>
  summarise(
    DOY = round(mean(DOY, na.rm = TRUE)),
    AVG_DLY_7D = weighted.mean(AVG_DLY_7D, N_FLTS, na.rm = TRUE),
    SHARE_DLY_15_7D = weighted.mean(SHARE_DLY_15_7D, N_FLTS, na.rm = TRUE),
    N_FLTS = sum(N_FLTS, na.rm = TRUE),
    .by = c(REGION, DATE, YEAR, WEEK)
  )

highlight_airports <- tribble(
  ~ICAO, ~AIRPORT,
  "SBGR", "Sao Paulo GRU",
  "SBGL", "Rio Galeao",
  "SBBR", "Brasilia",
  "EGLL", "Heathrow",
  "EDDF", "Frankfurt",
  "LPPT", "Lisbon"
)

highlight_daily <- delay_anim_weekly |>
  inner_join(highlight_airports, by = join_by(ICAO)) |>
  mutate(HIGHLIGHT = paste0(AIRPORT, " (", ICAO, ")"))

highlight_labels <- highlight_daily |>
  group_by(REGION, ICAO, YEAR) |>
  slice_max(DOY, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) |>
  ungroup() |>
  mutate(LABEL_DOY = DOY + 12)
```

## Animation

```{r}
#| label: build-animation

yield_delay <- 15

highlight_colors <- c(
  "Sao Paulo GRU (SBGR)" = "#007f5f",
  "Rio Galeao (SBGL)" = "#2b9348",
  "Brasilia (SBBR)" = "#80b918",
  "Heathrow (EGLL)" = "#3a86ff",
  "Frankfurt (EDDF)" = "#8338ec",
  "Lisbon (LPPT)" = "#ff9f1c"
)

plot_delay_profile <- function(frame_year) {
  ggplot(
    filter(delay_anim_weekly, YEAR == frame_year),
    aes(x = DOY, y = AVG_DLY_7D)
  ) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = yield_delay, linewidth = 0.45, linetype = "22", color = "#9d2f2f") +
    geom_line(aes(group = ICAO), linewidth = 0.35, alpha = 0.18, color = "#8f9699") +
    geom_line(
      data = filter(highlight_daily, YEAR == frame_year),
      aes(group = ICAO, color = HIGHLIGHT),
      linewidth = 0.9,
      alpha = 0.95
    ) +
    geom_line(
      data = filter(network_daily, YEAR == frame_year),
      aes(group = REGION),
      linewidth = 1.4,
      color = "#202020"
    ) +
    geom_point(
      data = filter(network_daily, YEAR == frame_year),
      aes(size = N_FLTS),
      color = "#202020",
      alpha = 0.85
    ) +
    geom_text(
      data = filter(highlight_labels, YEAR == frame_year),
      aes(x = LABEL_DOY, label = ICAO, color = HIGHLIGHT),
      hjust = 0,
      size = 3,
      fontface = "bold",
      show.legend = FALSE
    ) +
    annotate(
      "text",
      x = 8,
      y = yield_delay + 1.2,
      label = "15 min threshold",
      hjust = 0,
      vjust = 0,
      size = 3.2,
      color = "#9d2f2f"
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(
      values = highlight_colors,
      guide = guide_legend(title = NULL, override.aes = list(linewidth = 1.4, alpha = 1))
    ) +
    scale_size_area(max_size = 3.6, guide = "none") +
    scale_x_continuous(
      breaks = c(1, 91, 182, 274, 365),
      labels = c("Jan", "Apr", "Jul", "Oct", "Dec"),
      limits = c(1, 385),
      expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0))
    ) +
    scale_y_continuous(
      labels = label_number(suffix = " min"),
      limits = c(0, 50),
      expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.04))
    ) +
    facet_wrap(~ REGION, ncol = 1) +
    labs(
      title = "Chart-Challenge Day 22 - New Tool",
      subtitle = paste0("Brazilian and European airport delay pulse, ", frame_year, ": color highlights selected airports; black is the weighted regional average"),
      x = NULL,
      y = "Average positive delay",
      caption = "DECEA Performance Section and PRU EUROCONTROL; data Brazil-Europe comparison study - airport punctuality data, 2023-2025. Delay estimated from punctuality-bin midpoints."
    ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    theme(
      legend.position = "top",
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 18),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 11),
      plot.caption = element_text(color = "grey35")
    )
}
```

```{r}
#| label: render-animation

dir.create("figures", showWarnings = FALSE)
frame_dir <- file.path(tempdir(), "day22-frames")
dir.create(frame_dir, showWarnings = FALSE)

frame_years <- sort(unique(delay_anim_weekly$YEAR))
frame_paths <- file.path(frame_dir, paste0("delay-pulse-", frame_years, ".png"))

purrr::walk2(
  frame_years,
  frame_paths,
  \(frame_year, frame_path) {
    ggsave(
      filename = frame_path,
      plot = plot_delay_profile(frame_year),
      width = 9,
      height = 6,
      dpi = 150
    )
  }
)

delay_animation <- image_read(frame_paths) |>
  image_join() |>
  image_animate(fps = 1)

image_write(delay_animation, "figures/day22-new-tool-delay-pulse.gif")

knitr::include_graphics("figures/day22-new-tool-delay-pulse.gif")
```
